$$Source_Resource: A reference to a resource that has the source controls of a mapping.
$$Target_Resource: A reference to a resource that has the target controls of a mapping.
$$Map_Source_ID_Ref_list: A list of source reference IDs.
$$Map_Target_ID_Ref_list: A list of target reference IDs.
$$Map_Relationship: The relationship type for the mapping entry.
$Map_Confidence_Score: An estimation of the confidence that this mapping is correct and accurate expressed as percentage.
$Map_Coverage: An estimation of the percentage coverage of the targets by the sources.
